creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191960
py-pyIOSXR.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file for the Python package py-pyIOSXR, a Python library to manage devices running IOS-XR using the XML agent.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 and py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK


Note:
~~~~~
Before the port can be commited one package must be committed first:
- security/py-netmiko (see PR #227088: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227088)

--
Cheers
Kai
